seoTitle: Build a KPI Dashboard in Monday.com (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Design a Monday.com KPI dashboard with numbers, chart, and battery widgets to monitor business metrics and team performance at a glance.
intro: Manually pulling numbers together for a business review eats up time that could go toward decisions. This guide shows how to build a KPI dashboard in Monday.com by linking multiple boards and layering in widgets for metrics, trends, and progress, so leadership can see organizational health at a glance instead of waiting on a report.

steps.heading: Create a new dashboard and link boards
steps.body: Start a blank dashboard from your workspace directory and link it safely to your underlying operational boards.

steps.heading: Add Numbers widgets
steps.body: Use the Numbers Widget to aggregate key metrics like total sales, lead counts, or project expenses.

steps.heading: Add chart widgets for trends
steps.body: Add bar charts, line graphs, or pie charts to visualize monthly trends and performance distributions.

steps.heading: Set up the Battery widget for progress
steps.body: Use the Battery Widget to track real-time completion percentages and milestone roadblocks across departments.

steps.heading: Apply multi-board filters
steps.body: Configure filters to slice data dynamically by date ranges, project owners, or custom status tags.

steps.heading: Organize and share the dashboard
steps.body: Arrange the layout into logical sections and share view-only access links with stakeholders.

faq.question: Can I combine data from multiple boards in one dashboard?
faq.answer: Yes, a blank dashboard can link to multiple underlying operational boards to aggregate data in one view.

faq.question: What kinds of widgets are available for KPIs?
faq.answer: Numbers, Chart (bar, line, pie), Battery, and Table widgets are all covered as ways to visualize different types of metrics.

faq.question: Can stakeholders view the dashboard without editing it?
faq.answer: Yes, you can share view-only access links with high-level stakeholders.

faq.question: Can I filter the dashboard by date range or owner?
faq.answer: Yes, multi-board filters let you slice data dynamically by date ranges, project owners, or custom status tags.
